news.t: Demand For Reliable Power Is Fueling Nuclear Renaissance
Why the Nuclear Bull Market Has a Long Runway
U.S. Ban Could Spark Another 60% Hike In The Price Of Uranium

holdings.infoBox: URNJ is an equity ETF with a total of 37 individual holdings. The top holdings are Paladin Energy stock at 15.32%, Denison Mines at 14.25%, NexGen Energy at 12.36%, Energy Fuels at 11.97%, and Ur-Energy at 5.28%.

overview.description: The Sprott Junior Uranium Miners ETF (URNJ) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Nasdaq Sprott Junior Uranium Miners index. The fund seeks to track an index of small cap uranium miners around the globe, primarily those with revenues tied to the uranium mining and uranium industry. Securities are selected using a fundamental, proprietary methodology and weighted by market cap. URNJ was launched on Dec 3, 2019 and is issued by Sprott.
infoTable: Nasdaq Sprott Junior Uranium Miners Index

data.title: Demand For Reliable Power Is Fueling Nuclear Renaissance
data.text: The global energy landscape is leaning towards an emphasis on security and sustainability. Because of this shift, the role of nuclear power has gone from a debated alternative to a strategic necessity...

data.title: Why the Nuclear Bull Market Has a Long Runway
data.text: The nuclear energy sector continues to evolve, shifting from a niche alternative to a cornerstone of global energy sovereignty.

data.title: Uranium is having a “glow up” moment

data.title: Investing in Copper Miners
data.text: Sprott Asset Management launches its copper miners ETF. Steve Schoffstall discusses Sprott Copper Miners ETF as it provides exposure to large, mid, and small-cap copper miners.
